roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S REPLY DA'S OPPOSITION MOTION DISMISS FILED AT INSISTENCE
DA'S OPP TO DEFENSE MOT TO DISMISS FILED
DEFT'S MOTION ADD TO CALENDAR RELEASE SUBPOENAED RECORDS FILED
/CAL:PTC/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT OVER OBJECTION OF THE PEOPLE/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR SUBPOENAED RECORDS/DAWT/X:ENVELOPES 1 AND 2 ARE RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL WITHOUT  STIPULATION OF THE PEOPLE,/X:HEARING DATE OF 07-27-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/GTWM/SAORD/SA2:TERAESHA BLAKE AND SOPHIA GARRETT/SAORD2/SA3:576 BRIGHT STREET, SF, CA 94132/SAORD3/WEAP/ /CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PTC/DAWT/CONT/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT IF THERE IS A DISPOSTION
/CAL:PTC/DAWT/CONT/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT IF THERE IS A DISPOSITION IN THE MATTER,/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS/MO DENIED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT IF THERE IS A DISPOSITION IN THE MATTER,/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED,/CAUSE/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO DISMISS/X: OFF CALENDAR/
